pr_title: Refactor: Improve security and performance with new features

agent_summaries.security: Security analysis: Found 2 issues (1 high, 1 medium)
agent_summaries.performance: Performance analysis: Found 3 issues (1 high, 2 medium)
agent_summaries.architecture: Architecture analysis: Found 4 issues (1 high, 2 medium, 1 low)

priority_issues.description: The 'render_user_profile' method is vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks due to unsanitized user input being directly embedded into HTML.
priority_issues.recommendation: Escape user-controlled data before including it in HTML to prevent XSS attacks. Use a secure templating engine or encoding functions.

priority_issues.description: The get_all_users method lacks pagination, potentially loading all users at once.
priority_issues.recommendation: Implement pagination using LIMIT and OFFSET in the SQL query to fetch users in batches.

priority_issues.description: The 'UsersAPI' class method 'create_user' violates the Single Responsibility Principle by handling both database operations and business logic.
priority_issues.recommendation: Refactor the 'create_user' method to separate database operations into a data access class and keep business logic in the domain layer.

priority_issues.description: The 'cache_heavy_computation' method introduces a potential memory leak by storing computed results in an unbounded cache.
priority_issues.recommendation: Implement a cache eviction policy to limit the size of the cache and prevent memory exhaustion. Consider using time-based or size-based cache expiration strategies.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The process_items method has O(n²) complexity due to nested loops.
priority_issues.recommendation: Use a dictionary to count duplicates in O(n) time instead of nested loops.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The cache_heavy_computation method introduces a memory leak by growing the cache unbounded.
priority_issues.recommendation: Implement a cache eviction policy to limit the cache size or clear old entries.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The method 'get_all_users' in the 'UsersAPI' class violates the Single Responsibility Principle by combining pagination logic with data retrieval.
priority_issues.recommendation: Refactor the 'get_all_users' method to separate pagination logic into a dedicated class or method.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The 'DataProcessor' class method 'cache_heavy_computation' introduces a potential memory leak by caching results indefinitely.
priority_issues.recommendation: Implement a cache eviction strategy or limit the size of the cache to prevent memory leaks.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The 'UsersAPI' class method 'create_user' is growing in responsibility by directly interacting with the database and committing transactions.
priority_issues.recommendation: Consider moving the database transaction handling to a separate class or method to improve separation of concerns.
